# Ideas
> Personal idea archive. Human-readable and LLM-readable notes.

## How to use
- Browse the site homepage for public notes.
- Structured data: /api/articles.json
- Markdown notes live under /content/notes/

## Notes

### 我的第一条想法
- Date: 2026-06-20
- Tags: 开始, 想法仓库
- URL: /note.html?slug=hello-world
